message:
Merge PR #2934: fix: filter refinery MR listings by rig (cross-rig contamination)

Adds rig filtering to ListReadyMRs, ListBlockedMRs, ListAllOpenMRs,
ListQueueAnomalies, and Queue to prevent cross-rig MR contamination
via shared wisps table.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2934
Author: Cdfghglz

Co-authored-by: Cdfghglz <17733770+Cdfghglz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
